arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday 20 this weekend and James Mason has collated our writers' best bets for all seven games being played on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa join Tottenham in race to sign brilliant attacker with 14 goals & 11 assists this season
arts.sum: Tottenham and Aston Villa are among clubs reportedly eyeing Celtic winger Nicolas Kuhn as they seek to bolster their squad in the transfer market. The 25-year-old German has been in exceptional form this season, drawing interest from several Premier League clubs, including Spurs, Newcastle, and Aston Villa said to be keeping a close watch. Aston […] The post Aston Villa join Tottenham in race to sign brilliant attacker with 14 goals & 11 assists this season appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa reportedly in pursuit of 'extremely fast' talent likened to Eden Hazard and Alexis Sanchez
arts.sum: Aston Villa were one of the Premier League’s busiest clubs during the summer transfer window and it looks as though they’re taking a similar approach...

arts.ttl: Report: Dortmund reject Aston Villa's first bid for Malen
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Borussia Dortmund have rejected an initial bid from Aston Villa for Donyell Malen.

arts.ttl: Lewis Dobbin close to joining Norwich until the end of the season as Aston Villa call West Brom loan short after just ONE Championship start
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Bought in summer from Everton for £10million, Dobbin spent first half of the season on loan at West Brom, though he failed to make an impact for the Baggies.

arts.ttl: James McAtee: "The penny might have finally dropped" as Pep Guardiola urged to avoid "really bad" Cole Palmer, Morgan Rogers Man City repeat
arts.sum: "The penny might have finally dropped" for Man City manager Pep Guardiola regarding his use of James McAtee as a first-team player, Citizens expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy explains Leicester City issue as Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall transfer return mooted
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy did not rule out Leicester City attempting to bring Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall back to the club, but did explain why it wouldn’t currently be possible. Premier League sides are only allowed a maximum of two players on loan from rival clubs at any one time, and City have Facundo Buonanotte from Brighton and Odsonne Edouard from Crystal Palace in their ranks.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa have handled perfectly what could have been a significant issue in the NSWE era
arts.sum: Any significant contributor to the starting XI - from established senior personnel like Ollie Watkins, Emi Martinez and John McGinn - have all garnered interest at various stages in recent years, yet they've not only bought into what Villa have sold by way of a project, but they've also been suitably rewarded for their performances with agreeable terms offered their way as and when. As exciting as incoming transfers can be, in order to continue progressing on the pitch and improving performance, it's been imperative for a team like Villa - especially considering where they've arrived from since the turn of the year in 2019 - to retain their very best talent.
